publishedAbstract: - Ceph status shows a huge number of unknown pgs, eventhough all the OSDs are up and in- This is usually accompanied by issues in CephFS like '1 filesystem is degraded' and 'MDSs behind on trimming' ``` $ ceph-s cluster: id: 740391ec-b7dc-4d73-944a health: HEALTH_WARN 1 filesystem is degraded 1 MDSs behind on trimming Reduced data availability: 273 pgs inactive services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum i,k,l (age 59s) mgr: a(active, since 3m) mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 standby osd: 3 osds: 3 up (since 3d), 3 in (since 4M) data: volumes: 0/1 healthy, 1 recovering pools: 11 pools, 273 pgs objects: 0 objects, 0 B usage: 0 B used, 0 B / 0 B avail pgs: 100.000% pgs unknown 273 unknown ```
publishedTitle: ODF/CEPH: MGR not getting updates about PG states from OSDs and Ceph reports many PGs in "Unknown" state
